description: Monthly niche seasonality data — when each niche peaks for promotions. Updated monthly.

mushroom-foraging.notes: Fall foraging season is peak. Morel season drives spring sales.

birding.notes: Spring migration + CBC drive sales. Year-round market.

native-plants.notes: Spring gardening season = peak. Eco-awareness days boost sales.

women-outdoor.notes: Summer outdoor season + women's history month

trail-running.notes: Spring and fall trail seasons. Summer heat = decline.

vanlife.notes: Summer road trip season. Year-round community but peak in summer.

herbalism.notes: Year-round with peaks around herb harvesting season.

beekeeping.notes: Spring hive setup season. Honey harvest = August spike.
